title: adesmia zoellneri
intro: Adesmia zoellneri, also known as Zoellner's bean or False lupine, is a plant species native to South America that belongs to the legume family. The medicinal properties of Adesmia zoellneri include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to have potential health benefits. The health benefits of Adesmia zoellneri include its ability to help manage high blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as its potential to reduce the risk of certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Adesmia zoellneri are typically made into teas or infusions, which can be used to support cardiovascular health and overall well-being.
